case_title: KWON, SARAH vs. CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWON, SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION VERA, JANIRA E. DOES I THROUGHV SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-24-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-26-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-04-1995
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-25-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE FOR DISMISSAL. SANCTIONS ARE STAYED PENDING FILING OF DISMISSAL. HEARING SET FOR DEC-07-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-24-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-24-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER ACTION. HEARING SET FOR SEP-25-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-25-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-25-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-15-1995 CONTINUED FROM SEP-25-1995 TO OCT-25-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
